description: _scan_shell_sources silently drops unresolvable source includes (extensionless target, unresolved variable, for-loop variable) — trust-closure audit fails open on that edge class; .sh coverage floor does not backstop it

diff-added docstring claim 'an added import or sourced sibling cannot silently escape the classification' is false against HEAD (counterexample: extensionless/variable-reached sourced sibling drops silently)
constant_truth catches MemoryError/RecursionError converting resource exhaustion to 'unknown' (sibling sites catch only value-shaped exceptions)
guard violations print to stdout not stderr; inconsistent with repo breadcrumb convention and show's machine-parsed stdout
unpinned same-file ordinal count 'the four guarantees' — PR-553 rot class; reword drift-proof or pin
check_dependencies docstring failure list incomplete vs code (missing unknown kind/klass, symlink escape, py zero-import arms)
resolves_beneath_vendor docstring 'iff beneath' but code also accepts equality with vendor root (unreachable for real edges)
documented preserve-missing-leaf behavior for broken relative imports has no test (fail-open direction uncovered: a regression dropping broken-import edges stays green)
_declared_preflight_guarantees fail-closed RuntimeError arms (zero/multiple/duplicate/malformed declarations) untested
_profile_grant_auth returning None (helper in no profile) untested
synthetic-edge mode's forward-verification skip (live gate) relied on by injection tests but not asserted
heavy monkeypatching of private module internals couples ~80 assertions to private names
check_dependencies duck-typed edge validation duplicates only 2 of Edge's 3 constructor invariants (misses repo-owned⇒auth None)
Edge.auth carries authorization semantics as free-form prose; tests substring-match it
ExecSpec does not constrain target shape per class
scope record in _python_command_evidence is a stringly-keyed 9-field mutable dict
module-import side effects: PREFLIGHT_GUARANTEES computed at import (file I/O + possible RuntimeError at import time)
engine-surface change (lib/preflight.sh) carries no .changeset/*.md — changeset convention (#290) requires one; Phase 3 gate FAILs without it
_helper_dir_value accepts a parent-directory anchor (dirname …/..) as the helper directory — latent fail-open corner rebasing a repo-root escape in-repo; no current closure helper uses the shape
second bespoke shell lexer beside extract-command-heads.py/extract-command-shapes.py — coupled-maintenance burden; consider shared core
undeclared exec edges still escape (disclosed tradeoff); candidate-head warning machinery partially exists — follow-up
private cross-module API dependency on cwc._helper_source_path — promote to public name

completeness critic: capability-profiles vendored grants include scripts/preflight.py and scripts/verification-flight.py, absent from the AC1 closure (pre-existing, cloud_writer_contract.py unchanged by this PR) — their dependencies are never classified by the AC5 audit
